docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $667.59 FILED BY LOCO MOTO, LTD AS TO DEFENDANT HANSEN, ERIC M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOCO MOTO, LTD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANSEN, ERIC M. $157.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $165.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $16.50 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT HANSEN, ERIC M.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HANSEN, ERIC M.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $55.09 AS TO DEFENDANT HANSEN, ERIC M.
